_comment: Known CVEs that are intentionally accepted pending an upstream fix.

_policy.critical: NEVER ignore. Fix immediately or pin to safe version.
_policy.high: May be ignored temporarily with a written reason and expiry date. Max 30 days.
_policy.moderate: May be ignored with a reason and expiry date. Max 90 days.
_policy.low: May be ignored with a reason. Expiry encouraged but not enforced in CI.

ignore.reason: No upstream fix available as of added_on date. The vulnerable code path is not reachable in this collector. Re-evaluate when upstream releases a fix.
